strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq
Hands-on AI agent development at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks — a rare, explicitly required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere on the résumé, despite it being in the primary stack
Named testing tools (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are absent; testing expertise is demonstrated mostly in the D ecosystem (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Kotlin is not listed and Java exposure appears limited to older robotics/tooling work at Altom (2016–2018)
response.justification: The candidate exceeds the 6+ years requirement with well over a decade of fullstack work, including recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product development (Optilyz pricing platform, RIDE) and current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq that directly matches the required AI agent development skill. Database (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), cloud (AWS CDK), and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes via GISCollective) requirements are all evidenced. Gaps are framework-specific rather than fundamental: Nest.js and Vitest are unmentioned, and Kotlin/Java exposure is dated and thin — but a developer with this polyglot track record (D, C++, Swift, Java, TS) should close those quickly. Security/auth is not explicitly evidenced, keeping the score from the top end.
